ddt:Target.Name: SCU_HHN_C1AHS_v0
ddt:Target.Description:
[4] 2020/02/20 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Correction of the auto-identification parameters
[3] 11/12/2019 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot Creation of the screens DID modification (clearer names)
[2] 2019/04/23 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added Item: WS.
[1] 2019/03/14 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified item: Failures(OBD).
[N] 2018/04/05 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation.

Item.Text: [P0701](TBD)Shift position uncertainty continuation is abnormal now
[P07EE] Shifter signal input level comparison diagnosis failure
[P272A](TBD)Motor A drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
[P272C](TBD)Motor B drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[P0701] Shift position uncertainty continuation is abnormal now
[P07EE] Shifter signal input level comparison diagnosis failure
[P07F2] CAN control unit failrue _primary diagnosis status
[P18AC] Motor relay Hi diagnosis is abnormal
[P272A] Motor A drive circuit Lo side diagnosis status
[P272C] Motor B drive circuit Lo side diagnosis status
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD)Turning on look learning (the time of a driven early stage)(04h)

Data.Name: The IGN ON number of times
The motor fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E01
The motor fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E02
The motor fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E03
Driven opening, mode frequency integrated value
Motor fever (assessed value) The most high temperature
The ECU fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E07
The ECU fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E08
The ECU fever number of times ** beyond ? 1E09
ECU fever (assessed value) The most high temperature
The target shift location counter value
